2021-22 Cal State Fullerton Titans Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 21-11 (12-5, 2nd in Big West MBB)

Coach: Dedrique Taylor

PS/G: 70.0 (207th of 358)

PA/G: 66.5 (99th of 358)

SRS: -0.04 (154th of 358)

SOS: -2.28 (195th of 358)

ORtg: 104.2 (151st of 358)

DRtg: 99.0 (141st of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000

NCAA Tournament: (#15 seed in West)
Lost West First Round (78-61) versus #2 Duke

  • Big West Tourney Champ
